children.text: It's library day again! I'm excited! But it keeps raining and raining.
children.cn: 又是图书馆日了！我很兴奋！但雨一直下个不停。
children.explanation: 文中说 'it keeps raining and raining'（雨下个不停）。

children.cn: “妈妈，今天‘马背图书馆’会来吗？”

children.text: "Don't worry," says Mum. "It comes every week, rain or sun."
children.cn: “别担心，”妈妈说，“无论天晴还是下雨，它每周都会来。”
children.keywords: don't worry, every week, rain or sun
children.statement: 马背图书馆每个月只来一次。
children.explanation: 妈妈说它 'comes every week'（每周都来）。

children.text: "Did you also have library day in the past, Mum?"
children.cn: “妈妈，你以前也有图书馆日吗？”

children.text: "Yes, we did. But our library only came one time a month."
children.cn: “是的，我们也有。但我们的图书馆一个月只来一次。”
children.statement: 过去，图书馆比现在来得更勤。
children.explanation: 过去是一个月一次，现在是每周一次，所以现在更勤。

children.text: "No, there weren't. It was a small library."
children.statement: 妈妈小时候的图书馆非常大。
children.explanation: 妈妈说 'It was a small library'（那是一个小图书馆）。

children.statement: 妈妈以前并不喜欢读书。
children.explanation: 妈妈说 'Books made me happy'（书让我快乐）。

children.text: "Now I can see the 'horse library'." "Oh, yes. It's here!"
children.cn: “现在我能看到‘马背图书馆’了。”“哦，是的。它来了！”

children.text: I'm so happy. The library brings not only books but also hope.
children.cn: 我太开心了。图书馆带来的不仅是书，还有希望。
children.statement: 作者认为图书馆非常重要。
children.explanation: 他说图书馆带来了 'hope'（希望），说明了它的重要性。
